moments.title: Latitude Festival returns for 20th year
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a multi-genre music and arts festival, celebrates its 20th anniversary this year at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, featuring headliners like David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Music Headliners
angles.copy: Latitude Festival kicks off next week! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park? David Byrne, Lewis Capaldi, Teddy Swims and more are set to play across the weekend.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Beyond the music, Latitude is celebrating 20 years with comedy, theatre, literature and wellness. The perfect summer escape in Suffolk, July 23-26.

angles.name: Local Suffolk Angle
angles.copy: Suffolk is getting ready for Latitude Festival's 20th anniversary! Huge names are heading to Henham Park from July 23-26. Are you going?

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 Final approaches
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated final of Love Island UK 2026 is set to air on Monday, July 27, concluding eight weeks of drama, romance, and villa action.

angles.name: Countdown to Final
angles.copy: Love Island Grand Final confirmed for July 27! Who are your bets for the winning couple this year?

angles.name: Current Drama
angles.copy: Only days left until the Love Island final! The villa is heating up as couples solidify their connections and drama continues. Who's making it to the end?

angles.name: Viewer Anticipation
angles.copy: It's almost time to crown the Love Island 2026 winners! Get ready for declarations of love and big decisions on July 27.

moments.title: The Hundred 2026 cricket tournament begins
moments.blurb: The Hundred 2026 cricket tournament kicks off on July 21 with a double-header at the Kia Oval, featuring rebranded teams and new rules for an action-packed season across England and Wales.

angles.name: Tournament Kick-off
angles.copy: The Hundred is back! The 100-ball cricket tournament starts July 21 with a double-header at the Kia Oval. Ready for some fast-paced action?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Focus
angles.copy: Get ready, Wales! The Hundred is back from July 21, and our very own Welsh Fire are ready to light up the competition. Who's supporting them?

angles.name: New Season Hype
angles.copy: New teams, new rules, same explosive cricket! The Hundred 2026 season begins this Tuesday. Which team are you backing?

moments.title: Formula 1 Hungarian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: Formula 1 heads to the Hungaroring for the Hungarian Grand Prix, with the main race on Sunday, July 26, following practice and qualifying sessions.

angles.name: Race Weekend Alert
angles.copy: F1 is back this weekend for the Hungarian Grand Prix! Who are you tipping for pole position and the win at the Hungaroring?

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: Sunday means F1 Race Day! It's the Hungarian Grand Prix. Tune in to see who takes the top step of the podium.

angles.name: Championship Battle
angles.copy: The F1 season heats up in Hungary! With the Grand Prix on July 26, every point counts in the championship battle.

moments.title: Brian May of Queen's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Sir Brian May! What's your favourite Brian May riff?

angles.name: Rock & Science Angle
angles.copy: More than just a rock god! Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's Brian May – musician, songwriter, and astrophysicist.

angles.name: Queen's Icon
angles.copy: Raise a glass to the one and only Brian May, celebrating his 79th birthday tomorrow! Timeless guitar, timeless band.

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary Mexican-American guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his fusion of rock and Latin American jazz, turns 79 on July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Icon Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana! What's your go-to Santana track for those legendary guitar solos?

angles.name: Latin Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating 79 years of rhythm and guitar magic! Happy Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana on July 20.

angles.name: Woodstock Legend
angles.copy: From Woodstock to global icon, Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday. What a career!

moments.title: Don Henley of The Eagles' 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Don Henley, founding member, drummer, and lead vocalist for The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Legend Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley, the voice behind so many Eagles classics and a successful solo artist! What's your favourite Henley track?

angles.name: Solo Success Highlight
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer', Don Henley has delivered countless hits. Wishing him a very happy 79th birthday on Wednesday!

angles.name: Timeless Voice Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the 79th birthday of the legendary Don Henley this week. An absolute icon of rock and easy listening.

moments.title: Slash of Guns N' Roses' 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, known for his signature top hat and blistering solos, turns 61 on July 23.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses solo or riff from the guitar legend?

angles.name: Rock Icon Celebration
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 61st birthday to the British-American guitar icon, Slash! Still shredding and looking cool as ever.

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Focus
angles.copy: The man, the myth, the top hat! Happy 61st Birthday to Guns N' Roses' legendary guitarist, Slash, on Thursday.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music, acting career, and dance, celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo Celebration
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the multi-talented Jennifer Lopez! From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On The Floor', what's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Pop Icon Tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only J.Lo's 57th birthday this week! Still dominating the music, film, and fashion worlds.

angles.name: Dance & Pop Queen
angles.copy: It's Jennifer Lopez's birthday on Friday! Get ready to dance and celebrate the enduring career of this pop and dance icon.

moments.title: Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones' 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26, marking another year for one of rock's most influential figures.

angles.name: Rock Legend Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! Still got the moves, still got the voice. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Stones Frontman
angles.copy: Celebrating 83 years of rock 'n' roll with the one and only Mick Jagger! The ultimate frontman's birthday is on Sunday.

angles.name: Timeless Icon
angles.copy: From Dartford to global icon, Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this weekend. What an incredible legacy!

moments.title: UK schools break for summer holidays
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are breaking up for the summer holidays this week and next, marking the start of the long-awaited break for students and families.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: The great escape begins! Many schools across the UK are starting their summer holidays this week. What are your plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for many! Time for family adventures, staycations, or just relaxing in the sun.

angles.name: Local Break
angles.copy: Devon schools are breaking up! Wishing all students and teachers a fantastic summer holiday. What's top of your summer bucket list?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart latest
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is fresh with new entries and battles for the top spot, reflecting the hottest tracks being played across the country right now.

angles.name: Chart Buzz
angles.copy: New music Friday may be over, but the Official Singles Chart is still buzzing! What's your favourite new entry this week?

angles.name: Who's #1?
angles.copy: The race for the top spot on the Official Singles Chart is always fierce. Who do you think is currently reigning supreme?

angles.name: Weekend Anthems
angles.copy: Soundtracking your weekend with the biggest hits from the Official Singles Chart. What are you listening to?

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The world's best golfers battle it out on the final day of The Open Championship 2026 at Royal Troon in Scotland, vying for the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: Final Day Drama
angles.copy: It's the final day of The Open Championship! Who will hold their nerve and lift the Claret Jug at Royal Troon today?

angles.name: Scottish Golf
angles.copy: All eyes on Royal Troon as The Open concludes today in Scotland. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Major Golf Event
angles.copy: The Open Championship: The pinnacle of golf. Don't miss the thrilling conclusion as a new champion is crowned.

moments.title: UK enjoying a spell of summer weather
moments.blurb: The UK is set to enjoy a spell of warm and sunny weather over the coming days, perfect for outdoor activities and making the most of summer.

angles.name: Sunshine Alert
angles.copy: Sunshine and warmer temperatures are on the way for much of the UK! Time to get out and enjoy the summer weather.

angles.name: Beat the Heat
angles.copy: Make the most of the lovely weather this weekend! What are your plans for soaking up the sunshine?

angles.name: Local Forecast
angles.copy: Devon: The sun is shining! Get ready for some glorious summer weather over the next few days.
